abilities.name: Sharing
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may look at your opponent's hand. If your opponent has any Supporter cards there, choose 1 of them. Your opponent discards that card and you use the effect of that card as the effect of this power. This power can't be used if Milotic is affected by a Special Condition.

tests.name: sharing_reveals_hand
tests.description: Test that Sharing reveals opponent's hand

tests.name: sharing_effect_id
tests.description: Test that effect ID is correctly formatted
